plan.failureSummary: The page.ai execution failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is not present in the current UI. Visual evidence shows the form now contains a single 'Your Name' field instead.
observedIndicators: Flexible semantic intent: 'Fill out the all of the survey questions'
Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' while cached selector sought 'Last Name'
'Set 2' badge in screenshot indicates dynamic page variants

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test.
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive enabled. This will force page.ai to re-scan the page and generate fresh instructions compatible with the current form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Verify stability of new form elements.
remediationSteps.details: If the failure persists after clearing the cache, verify that the 'Your Name' field and other new elements have stable attributes that the autonomous agent can reliably target.

plan.notes: The test objective 'Fill out the all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible. The failure screenshot shows a 'Set 2' badge, confirming the page structure is dynamic or under A/B test. In DETERMINISTIC mode, the tool used cached selectors for an older version of the form. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the current UI layout.
